languages.text: "Вы правы, досточтимый коллега. Я действительно короткоживущее нелепое создание с примитивным рассудком и крайне сомнительными когнитивными способностями..."
"You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."
languages.original_text: "Вы правы, досточтимый коллега. Я действительно короткоживущее нелепое создание с примитивным рассудком и крайне сомнительными когнитивными способностями..."

traits.locale_text: "You are correct, esteemed colleague. I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."
"You are correct, esteemed colleague. I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

"You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."
"You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

languages.text: "Ihr habt recht, geschätzter Kollege. Ich bin in der Tat eine kurzlebige, absurde Kreatur mit einem rudimentären Verstand und überaus zweifelhaften kognitiven Fähigkeiten ..."
languages.original_text: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt recht, geschätzter Kollege. Ich bin in der Tat eine kurzlebige, absurde Kreatur mit einem rudimentären Verstand und überaus zweifelhaften kognitiven Fähigkeiten ..."

languages.text: « Vous avez raison, mon estimé collègue : je suis en effet une créature absurde et éphémère, dotée d'un esprit primitif aux capacités cognitives terriblement limitées... »
languages.original_text: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison, mon estimé collègue : je suis en effet une créature absurde et éphémère, dotée d'un esprit primitif aux capacités cognitives terriblement limitées...

languages.text: «Tienes razón, mi estimado colega. Soy, efectivamente, un ser efímero y absurdo, con una mente rudimentaria y capacidades cognitivas cuestionables...».
languages.original_text: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

traits.locale_text: «Tienes razón, mi estimado colega. Soy, efectivamente, un ser efímero y absurdo, con una mente rudimentaria y capacidades cognitivas cuestionables...».

languages.text: "Haklısın saygıdeğer meslektaşım: Ben gerçekten de ilkel bir zihne ve tamamen şüpheli bilişsel yeteneklere sahip, ömrü kısa, absürt bir yaratığım..."
languages.original_text: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

traits.locale_text: "Haklısın saygıdeğer meslektaşım: Ben gerçekten de ilkel bir zihne ve tamamen şüpheli bilişsel yeteneklere sahip, ömrü kısa, absürt bir yaratığım..."

languages.text: “您说得对，我尊敬的同僚。我确实是个短命、荒谬、思维粗陋、认知能力堪忧的生物……”
languages.original_text: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

traits.locale_text: “您说得对，我尊敬的同僚。我确实是个短命、荒谬、思维粗陋、认知能力堪忧的生物……”

languages.text: 「あなたの言う通りです、我が尊敬すべき同僚――私は確かに、原始的な精神と、まったくもって疑わしい認知能力しか持たぬ、短命で不条理な生き物です……」
languages.original_text: "You are correct, my esteemed colleague: I am indeed a short-lived, absurd creature with a rudimentary mind and utterly questionable cognitive abilities..."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの言う通りです、我が尊敬すべき同僚――私は確かに、原始的な精神と、まったくもって疑わしい認知能力しか持たぬ、短命で不条理な生き物です……」
